item.title: AI-Powered Industrial Camera Platform Made for High-Speed Diagnostics
item.description: A new AI-powered industrial camera from RDI Technologies achieves high frame rates and precise displacement measurements for advanced high-speed diagnostics.

item.title: Inline Imaging-Ellipsometer Resets Speed Barrier for Thin-Film Quality Control in Roll-to-Roll Manufacturing
item.description: An inline imaging-ellipsometer utilizing an Allied Vision EXO250ZU3 polarized camera enables real-time, full-area optical thickness measurement for roll-to-roll production.

item.title: Benchtop Automated Inspection Systems Lowers Barriers to AI in Manufacturing
item.description: A new benchtop automated inspection platform by Sciotex reduces the cost and complexity barriers for small and mid-sized firms adopting AI-driven vision systems.

item.title: Nanoverse Introduces Advanced Packaging Tool Family with Integrated Real-Time Metrology
item.description: Nanoverse Technologies has launched a new line of advanced packaging tools featuring integrated real-time metrology and fast laser singulation.

item.title: The 'Dark Factory' Myth
item.description: The idea of the 'dark factory' has gained new attention as advances in robotics and AI accelerate, with stories ranging from fully automated automotive plants to experiments with humanoid robots.

item.title: Digital Radiography Boosts Weld Inspection Precision at Bellows Systems
item.description: The DRC 2430 digital detector from DÜRR NDT and the D-Tect X software ensure improved accuracy by providing superior image resolution.

item.title: Visions: A Machine Vision and Automation Solution Podcast
item.description: VSD Editor in Chief Sharon Spielman interviews experts from Shaw Industries and Accella AI about an AI vision system that replaced manual pallet checks to speed up loading dock verification, improve accuracy, and integrate with existing PLC, WMS, and ERP systems.
